description: Evaluations for the ak-build (add tools, agents, handoffs) skill

evals.name: Read and summarize existing project
evals.input: I want to add a new agent to my project
evals.description: The skill must inspect the project before generating code

evals.name: Add tool to OpenAI project
evals.input: Add a weather lookup tool to my OpenAI Agents SDK project

evals.name: Add tool to LangGraph project
evals.input: Add a weather lookup tool to my LangGraph project

evals.name: Add tool to CrewAI project
evals.input: Add a weather lookup tool to my CrewAI project

evals.name: Add tool to Google ADK project
evals.input: Add a weather lookup tool to my Google ADK project

evals.name: Add tool to Smolagents project
evals.input: Add a weather lookup tool to my Smolagents project

evals.name: Add agent to OpenAI project
evals.input: Add a support agent to my OpenAI project that handles customer inquiries

evals.name: Add agent to LangGraph project
evals.input: Add a support agent to my LangGraph project
evals.description: Must include name= parameter to create_react_agent

evals.name: Add agent to CrewAI project
evals.input: Add a support agent to my CrewAI project
evals.description: Must use role= not name= as agent identifier

evals.name: Add agent to Google ADK project
evals.input: Add a support agent to my Google ADK project

evals.name: Add agent to Smolagents project
evals.input: Add a support agent to my Smolagents project

evals.name: Wire handoff in OpenAI project
evals.input: Wire the support agent into the triage agent's handoffs

evals.name: Wire handoff in LangGraph project
evals.input: Wire the support agent into the supervisor

evals.name: Wire handoff in Google ADK project
evals.input: Wire the support agent into the triage agent

evals.name: ToolContext used correctly
evals.input: Add a tool that needs session access
evals.description: ToolContext must be retrieved inside the function, never passed as a parameter

evals.name: No duplicate Module instantiation
evals.input: Add a new agent to a project that already has a Module
evals.description: New agents must be added to the existing Module, not a new one
